response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio lyrics and dialogue phonetically matched the reference lyrics for 'Wishful Garnet'.
2. JSON Usage: Fully integrated the provided lyrics, translating them with proper semantic flow and aligning them to the audio events.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps have been meticulously structured to trigger exactly when vocals begin, using truncation and precise transitions to prevent delays during rapid speech. Checked and corrected start/end timestamp mismatches.

subtitles.original: あ！次の歌は…最後の歌です。
subtitles.english: Ah! This next song... is our last song.

subtitles.original: えー！
subtitles.english: Aw...

subtitles.original: でも、特別だよ！
subtitles.english: But, you know... it's a very special one.

subtitles.original: フワモコは魔界の番犬として、みんなの笑顔を守るためにここにいるんだよね！
subtitles.english: You know, FUWAMOCO, as demon guard dogs, we're here to protect your smile, right?

subtitles.original: これからもそうしていくよ。笑顔を守るために！
subtitles.english: We will continue to do that. To protect your smile!

subtitles.original: アイドルとして、全力でね！
subtitles.english: Yeah, doing our all as idols!

subtitles.original: それに、ふわふわでもこもこな魂もね！
subtitles.english: And just as our fluffy and fuzzy souls, too!

subtitles.original: 何千年も、何万年も、魔界の犬の歳としてここに居続けるよ！
subtitles.english: We'll continue to be here for thousands and thousands of demon dog years.

subtitles.original: 毎日が当たり前じゃないってことを思い出しながらね。
subtitles.english: All while remembering that everyday isn't given.

subtitles.original: 当たり前なことなんて何一つないからね。
subtitles.english: We don't take anything for granted.

subtitles.original: だから落ち込んだ時は、私たちがいつでもここで応援してるって思い出してね！
subtitles.english: And you know, when you're down, we hope you'll remember that we're always here cheering you on, okay?

subtitles.original: うん！ラフィアンズを全力で応援するよ！
subtitles.english: Yes! We'll cheer you on, Ruffians!

subtitles.original: だから、今日の最後の曲の歌詞を、よーく聴いててね！
subtitles.english: So, please listen closely to the lyrics of our last song for today!

subtitles.original: 明日も
subtitles.english: May tomorrow...

subtitles.original: 明後日も
subtitles.english: ...and the day after too...

subtitles.original: あなたが笑ってますように
subtitles.english: ...I hope you will be laughing...

subtitles.original: ずっと
subtitles.english: ...forever.

subtitles.original: Lala...
subtitles.english: Lala...

subtitles.original: ラフィアンズ、今日は私たちの誕生日を一緒に過ごしてくれて本当にありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much Ruffians for spending our birthday with us today!

subtitles.original: 辛い時はいつでもこの歌を思い出して、私たちがそばにいることを忘れないでね。
subtitles.english: Please think of this song whenever things are rough, and know that we'll be here.

subtitles.original: この最後の歌をみんなに贈ります。
subtitles.english: This last song is for you.

subtitles.original: 「Wishful Garnet」！
subtitles.english: Wishful Garnet!

subtitles.original: 過去を振り返ると 思い出す
subtitles.english: When I look back at the past, I remember

subtitles.original: ガーネットの空 溢れてく 光
subtitles.english: The light overflowing from the garnet sky

subtitles.original: この瞳に映し出された あの日は
subtitles.english: The day reflected in these eyes of mine

subtitles.original: 美しく 揺れる
subtitles.english: Sways beautifully

subtitles.original: What do you think?
subtitles.english: What do you think?

subtitles.original: 紅く 滲んだ空に
subtitles.english: To the sky tinged with red...

subtitles.original: 願いました どうかこの願い
subtitles.english: ...I made a wish, please let this wish...

subtitles.original: 届けてください
subtitles.english: ...reach you.

subtitles.original: 明日も
subtitles.english: May tomorrow...

subtitles.original: 明後日も
subtitles.english: ...and the day after too...

subtitles.original: あなたが笑ってますように
subtitles.english: ...I hope you will be laughing.

subtitles.original: 離れ離れになっても
subtitles.english: Even if we are apart...

subtitles.original: 前を向けますように
subtitles.english: ...I hope you can keep looking forward.

subtitles.original: あなたを縛る鎖を
subtitles.english: The chains that bind you...

subtitles.original: わたしが壊してあげる
subtitles.english: ...I will break them for you.

subtitles.original: もう負けないで
subtitles.english: Do not give up...

subtitles.original: 進むこと
subtitles.english: ...keep moving forward.

subtitles.original: いつでもそばにいるから
subtitles.english: Because I will always be by your side.
